sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّاسُ فِي الْقَدِيمِ يُضِيئُونَ بُيُوتَهُمْ بِالزَّيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Nekada su ljudi osvjetljavali kuće uljem.
sentences.translationEn: People in the old days used to light their homes with oil.

sentences.translation: Lampa je bila napravljena od gline.
sentences.translationEn: The lamp was made of clay.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يُوضَعُ فِيهِ زَيْتُ الزَّيْتُونِ وَفَتِيلٌ صَغِيرٌ.
sentences.translation: Stavljalo se u njega maslinovo ulje i mali fitilj.
sentences.translationEn: Olive oil and a small wick were placed in it.

sentences.translation: Lampa je osvjetljavala sobu mirnim svjetlom.
sentences.translationEn: The lamp lit the room with a soft light.
